name: qa-toolbar-sandbox
description: QA Toolbar Sandbox — rebuilt from the Tampermonkey userscript as a plain HTML/CSS/JS Manifest V3 extension, no build step. Landing page rebuilt separately in apps/landing.

scripts.backend:check: npx --yes deno@latest test --config supabase/functions/deno.json --allow-env supabase/functions/_shared/http_test.ts supabase/functions/_shared/admin_mfa_test.ts && npx --yes deno@latest check --config supabase/functions/deno.json supabase/functions/checkout-create-session/index.ts supabase/functions/stripe-webhook/index.ts supabase/functions/voucher-redeem/index.ts supabase/functions/voucher-preview/index.ts supabase/functions/legal-registration/index.ts supabase/functions/referral-track/index.ts supabase/functions/keep-alive/index.ts supabase/functions/access-status/index.ts supabase/functions/auth-sign-in/index.ts supabase/functions/auth-refresh/index.ts supabase/functions/auth-recover-password/index.ts supabase/functions/admin-email-otp/index.ts supabase/functions/account-delete/index.ts
scripts.release:chrome:update: npm run security:repo && npm run security:extension && npm run test:chrome && npm run package:extension
scripts.release:chrome:upload: npm run security:repo && npm run security:extension && npm run test:chrome && node scripts/package-extension.mjs --output=artifacts/chrome-web-store-package.zip && node scripts/publish-chrome-webstore.mjs --zip=artifacts/chrome-web-store-package.zip
scripts.release:chrome:publish: npm run security:repo && npm run security:extension && npm run test:chrome && node scripts/package-extension.mjs --output=artifacts/chrome-web-store-package.zip && node scripts/publish-chrome-webstore.mjs --zip=artifacts/chrome-web-store-package.zip --publish
